title: Prepare an App Store submission
description: Take a build through versioning, signing, privacy declarations, and validation before uploading for review.
body: Steps: 1. Set the version and build number and select a Release configuration. 2. Confirm distribution signing: distribution certificate and provisioning profile, matching entitlements. 3. Complete App Privacy details and ensure every sensitive API has a usage string and real justification. 4. Archive and run validation in Xcode/Transporter to catch missing assets, entitlement, or privacy issues. 5. Upload and submit, watching for review feedback on privacy and background modes. Rollback point: before submitting (a rejected/withdrawn build costs a review cycle). Validation: the archive validates clean and review accepts privacy/background declarations; submitting with a missing usage string or undeclared data collection is the common rejection this prevents.
